purpose: Guard shadow outcome quality with live freshness tiers, closed-H1-only price bridge, stable subject keys, deduplication, and pending carry-forward.
closed_h1_rule: Only H1 buckets with source_last_m5_ts >= bucket_start + 55 minutes are eligible.
stable_subject_key: subject_type + memory_id + instrument + timeframe + direction_side + anchor_h1_bar_open_ts_utc/anchor_ts_utc + reason_code
